title: Add task list support to markdown renderer
description: pulldown-cmark supports ENABLE_TASKLISTS. Need to: 1) add Options::ENABLE_TASKLISTS to parser in render_markdown_with_width, 2) handle Event::TaskListMarker(checked) — replace default '- ' prefix with '☑ ' (checked) or '☐ ' (unchecked). Design: ai/design/chat-rendering-enhancements.md
